title: Re:zero Paintings
description: Excited for season 4? Take a look at your favourite characthers from re:zero
body:
![Paintings ](https://i.imgur.com/X7LviO9.png)

![Paintings](https://i.imgur.com/ttSHdA3.png)

![Paintings](https://i.imgur.com/dZxeIIv.png)

This is a small mod, that brings your favourites characters from Re:zero to your buildings, there are up to 19 paintings.


Since we have some fanmade paintings, we would love if you supports these artist:

[岩蟲](https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/15144367)

[Rokaroka](https://x.com/Ro_ka_ro_ka)
